title: linaria oblongifolia subsp. haenseleri
intro: Linaria oblongifolia subsp. haenseleri, also known as the Haensel's Toadflax, is a rare and endangered plant species belonging to the figwort family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Linaria oblongifolia subsp. haenseleri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
